summary: Tested AgoBot P1 features: ML Auto-Training Fix & WebSocket Real-time Updates. All 10 backend tests pass. All 6 pages load correctly. LIVE indicator working. ML status confirmed LEARNING with labeled_signals=86, training_samples=0.

issues: React hydration warnings: <tr> / <th> / <span> / <option> as invalid HTML table children (span wrapping around table rows/cells). Caused by React dev overlay but visually OK. Could cause SSR mismatch if SSR is added.
Page shows loading spinner for extended period (slow data fetch from orderflow API), but eventually loads without errors.

action_items: Minor: Fix HTML table structure - avoid wrapping <tr>/<th>/<option> in <span> to suppress React hydration warnings. Affects DashboardPage.js TradeRow and TradesPage.js thead mapping.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: include_router called twice for each router in a loop (duplicate routes registered). Line: `app.include_router(router, prefix=api_prefix)` appears twice inside the loop. This is harmless but wastes memory and may cause duplicate OpenAPI docs.
React hydration warning: .map() inside <tbody>/<tr> wrapped by React's internal <span> — not a code bug per se but indicates React strict mode dev overlay interference.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth token field is 'access_token' (not 'token'). Risk endpoint is /api/risk/circuit-breaker. Market Intel is /api/orderflow. All pages working. WS connects and shows LIVE indicator. ML status: LEARNING, labeled_signals=86, training_samples=0.

feature_verification.dashboard_live_updates: PASS - WebSocket scan_update listener in place, dashboard shows LIVE MODE
feature_verification.bot_mode_display: PASS - Shows LIVE MODE with last scan time in header
feature_verification.ml_page: PASS - LEARNING mode, labeled_signals=86, training_samples=0 confirmed
feature_verification.risk_page: PASS - Circuit breaker ARMED, market regime CALM for all symbols
feature_verification.market_intel_page: PASS - Orderflow data loading (slow but no errors)
